description: Sector overlay for South African broadcasting, content distribution, online content, advertising, publishing, media complaints, and audience/privacy documentation.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Media. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African statutes, regulators, guidance, and sector sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: ICASA broadcasting mandate and Broadcasting Act framework
Film and Publications Act / FPB mandate
Advertising Regulatory Board Code of Advertising Practice
used_for: legal, decent, honest and truthful advertising

primary_sources.name: Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013
primary_sources.issuer: Information Regulator / Republic of South Africa

rules.title: Broadcast licence or ICASA authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ICASA licence, broadcasting service authorization, licence conditions, or compliance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: FPB content classification or distributor registration evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for FPB classification, distributor registration, age rating, harmful content, or online-content compliance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Film and Publications Act / FPB mandate

rules.title: Advertising standards evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for advertising claims, substantiation, legal/decent/honest/truthful standards, or complaints handling.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Audience or consumer complaint evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for complaint channels, broadcast complaints, correction, right of reply, or consumer redress evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.

rules.title: Audience, subscriber, or marketing-data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for POPIA, privacy notice, consent, subscriber data, audience data, or direct marketing controls.
